title: Items Highlighter
description: Selected items with a colored overlay
body:
⏱️ **Item Highlighter — Highlight Important Items**

Tired of searching for key items in the middle of a fight?  
`Item Highlighter` highlights selected items with a colored overlay directly on the item icon.

It works in both hotbar and inventory, with a separate color for each tracked item.

✨ **Features:**  
🎯 Highlights selected items in **hotbar and inventory**  
🌈 Custom color per item  
🔎 Smart item input 
⚡ Autocomplete suggestions while typing  
🧹 One-click item removal from the list  
🎨 Color picker window + **HEX** color input  
⌨️ Configurable keybind to open the menu  
⚙️ Fully configurable via **Mod Menu + Cloth Config**

🎯 **Why use it:**  
Instantly spot totems, pearls, gapples, and other important items  
Great for PvP and fast-paced gameplay  
Cleaner than adding extra HUD widgets

🛠️ **Compatibility:**  
Works on **Fabric**  
Supported Minecraft version: **1.21.4**  
Requires: **Fabric API**, **Cloth Config**  
Optional (for config screen): **Mod Menu**

📌 **Usage:**  
Open `Mod Menu -> Item Highlighter -> Configure`  
or press your configured open-menu key  
Add an item by name, pick a color, and save  
Done: tracked items are highlighted instantly in hotbar and inventory

📩 For questions and bug reports: Telegram / Discord — **@b1nt1n**
